description_long: This is a tall, cylindrical top hat with a rich, dark brown, velvety texture and a wide, flat brim. Around the base of the crown, a dark gray fabric band encircles the hat, adorned with several metallic silver gears and cogs, giving it a distinct steampunk aesthetic. The gears are attached at various points, with a cluster of three on one side and single gears on the opposite and rear sides. The crown is flat-topped and the brim is slightly irregular, adding to its vintage, hand-crafted appearance. The hat appears lightweight and designed for decorative or costume use, rather than formal wear. No visible brand or logo is present, but the mechanical embellishments are prominent and eye-catching.
description: A dark brown, velvety steampunk top hat with a flat crown, wide brim, and metallic gear decorations on a gray band.
description_view_0: Front view shows the flat-topped crown, wide brim, and a large gear on the left side of the gray band.
description_view_1: Rear view highlights a small rectangular metallic detail on the back of the crown and a gear on the left side.
description_view_2: Side view displays the cylindrical shape, the gray band, and a large gear on the right side.
description_view_3: Opposite side view reveals a cluster of three metallic gears attached to the band and crown.
